landing.hero_subtitle: Advanced dropout prediction system for Zilla Parishad schools. Identify at-risk students early and take proactive interventions.
landing.feature1_desc: Advanced TabNet deep learning model with 97.5% accuracy for early dropout detection
landing.feature2_desc: Comprehensive dashboards with actionable insights and trend analysis
landing.feature3_desc: Get predictions in milliseconds with batch processing support
landing.feature4_desc: Enterprise-grade security with encrypted data storage
landing.feature5_desc: Complete student lifecycle tracking with intervention planning
landing.feature6_desc: Track entire classes with customizable filters and reports
landing.cta_subtitle: Join hundreds of schools using our AI-powered system to reduce dropout rates and improve student outcomes.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor student performance and dropout risk analytics
dashboard.no_high_risk: No high-risk students at the moment
dashboard.insight_positive: Risk levels are under control — keep maintaining student monitoring!
dashboard.insight_high_risk_alert: {{pct}}% of students are at critical dropout risk — immediate action required
dashboard.insight_moderate_risk: {{pct}}% dropout risk detected — schedule interventions soon
dashboard.insight_low_attendance: Average attendance {{att}}% is below the 75% target — attendance drive needed

portal.family_access_link: Student or parent? Open family portal
portal.access_title: Open the student and parent portal
portal.access_subtitle: Use the portal to see attendance, marks, risk alerts, school support plans, and meeting updates in simple language.
portal.student_access_desc: Students can log in with student ID and password to see personal progress and school support.
portal.parent_access_desc: Parents can open the child dashboard using student ID, roll number, and admission year.
portal.student_login_help: Enter your student ID and password to see your learning progress.
portal.parent_login_help: Enter the student details below to see the child summary in simple language.
portal.access_failed: Portal access failed. Please check the details and try again.
portal.refresh_failed: Portal data could not be refreshed right now.
portal.no_portal_data: Portal data is not available right now.
portal.student_summary_text: This dashboard shows your attendance, marks, risk level, school meetings, and support plans in real time.
portal.parent_summary_text: This dashboard helps parents quickly understand school attendance, marks, risk level, and support actions.
portal.attendance_target: Green progress helps reduce dropout risk.
portal.no_support_plans: No support plans have been added yet.
portal.progress_snapshot_subtitle: See attendance, marks, and risk together
portal.recommendations_subtitle: Practical next steps for the family
portal.support_health_note: A clear support plan usually means the school is already helping.
portal.attendance_good_story: Attendance is healthy and close to the target.
portal.attendance_need_help_story: Attendance needs attention. Missing school often raises dropout risk.
portal.marks_good_story: Marks are in a safer range right now.
portal.marks_need_help_story: Marks need support. Extra study help can improve results.
portal.risk_high_story: Risk is high right now. Please act quickly with the school.
portal.risk_low_story: Risk is low right now, but regular follow-up is still important.
portal.high_dropout_risk_message: Immediate support is recommended to improve attendance and academic performance.
portal.attendance_below_target_message: Attendance is {{attendance}}%. The school target is 75% or above.
portal.marks_improvement_message: Current marks are {{marks}}. Extra academic support is advised.
portal.progress_stable_message: No urgent alerts at the moment. Continue regular follow-up.
portal.recommendation_attendance_description: Track daily attendance and speak with the school if travel or health issues are causing absences.
portal.recommendation_study_description: Plan extra practice time, revision sessions, or teacher support for weaker subjects.
portal.recommendation_support_description: Ask the school about scholarship, uniform, transport, or other financial support schemes.
portal.recommendation_commute_description: Travel issues often affect attendance. Build a clear commute routine with backup options.
portal.recommendation_monitor_description: Attendance and marks are in a healthy range. Continue the current study routine and school follow-up.
